---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to achieve that is hard, slow, or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like the library to do? Be as specific as you can (API shape, formats, performance goals).

## Alternatives considered

What else have you tried (other libraries, workflows, workarounds)?

## Context

- Dataset scale (rows, columns, on-disk vs in-memory):
- Target environment (CPU-only, specific GPU/OpenCL stack):
- Link to papers, prior art, or related issues (if any):
